crises.name: Displacement and Shelter Crisis
crises.description: Support for displaced families, shelter operations, and winter readiness.

crises.name: Food Security Crisis
crises.description: Food access disruption requiring sustained distribution and support.

crises.name: Public Health Crisis
crises.description: Community health pressure requiring clinics, hygiene, and vaccination support.

crises.name: Emergency Logistics Crisis
crises.description: Rapid-response operations, logistics coordination, and field assessments.

crises.name: Environmental Recovery Crisis
crises.description: Environmental damage mitigation and restoration campaigns.

organizations.name: Cedar Relief Network
organizations.description: A Beirut-based humanitarian organization coordinating rapid-response support, beneficiary intake, and emergency household assistance for vulnerable families across Greater Beirut.

organizations.name: Bekaa Food Bank Initiative
organizations.description: A regional food security nonprofit focused on pantry operations, produce rescue, and dignified food parcel distribution across Zahle, Chtaura, and West Bekaa.

organizations.name: Green Coast Lebanon
organizations.description: An environmental nonprofit organizing coastal cleanups, tree planting, recycling education, and public engagement campaigns along the Lebanese coast and mountain trails.

organizations.name: Teach Forward Beirut
organizations.description: An education-focused nonprofit supporting after-school tutoring, homework clubs, exam preparation, and family engagement for underserved students.

organizations.name: Akkar Mobile Health Collective
organizations.description: A healthcare outreach organization running mobile clinics, vaccination support, registration desks, and pharmacy preparation in underserved communities in Akkar.

organizations.name: Saida Community Kitchens
organizations.description: A community food program providing hot meals, nutrition outreach, beneficiary coordination, and family support through kitchen and delivery operations in Saida.

organizations.name: Tripoli Youth Tech Hub
organizations.description: A youth development nonprofit providing digital literacy workshops, computer lab support, coding exposure, and student tech assistance in North Lebanon.

organizations.name: South Shelter Support
organizations.description: A crisis-response organization managing temporary shelter logistics, registration, hygiene kit preparation, and child-friendly support activities in South Lebanon.

organizations.name: Mount Lebanon Care Alliance
organizations.description: A care-focused nonprofit serving seniors and vulnerable adults through home visits, medication delivery, accessibility support, and community companionship programs.

organizations.name: North Logistics Response Unit
organizations.description: A logistics-oriented humanitarian team handling warehouse operations, route planning, dispatch support, and inventory control for relief operations in North Lebanon.

volunteers.description: I am a public health volunteer with experience supporting clinic registration, screening days, and medication prep. I enjoy calm, people-facing roles where I can combine empathy with organized execution. I am especially motivated by mobile health and preventive care outreach.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
B.S. in Public Health, Lebanese University.
Volunteered in vaccination registration and clinic intake events in Akkar.
Comfortable with beneficiary interaction, basic screening support, and digital forms.
Fluent in Arabic and English with strong documentation habits.

volunteers.description: I have spent most of my volunteer time in warehouse sorting, dispatch support, and family parcel preparation. I like structured operations with clear movement of goods and measurable output. I am reliable on shift-based logistics work and inventory-heavy tasks.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Operations assistant with experience in stock handling and warehouse organization.
Supported dispatch and pallet sorting during relief campaigns in North Lebanon.
Comfortable with inventory sheets, labeling, and physical sorting tasks.
Used Excel and paper logs for warehouse tracking.

volunteers.description: I enjoy working with school-aged children in tutoring and enrichment settings. My strongest roles are homework support, reading practice, and small-group educational activities. I prefer opportunities where I can help students build confidence over time.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Education student with volunteer experience in reading mentorship and homework clubs.
Facilitated small-group activities for learners in Beirut.
Strong communication skills with children and parents.
Interested in literacy, educational equity, and youth development.

volunteers.description: My volunteer background is centered on environmental action, especially cleanup events and restoration days. I am comfortable outdoors, coordinating tasks, and speaking to the public about sustainability. I like practical roles that turn awareness into visible community impact.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Environmental engineering graduate involved in coastal cleanup and reforestation campaigns.
Supported waste audit efforts and volunteer coordination in Batroun and Chouf.
Experience with public engagement booths and event logistics.
Interested in circular economy and local environmental stewardship.

volunteers.description: I am drawn to people-centered volunteer work where trust, listening, and emotional safety matter. My past roles include intake support, child-friendly activities, and home-visit style community engagement. I work best in teams serving families, children, or older adults.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Psychology graduate with volunteer exposure to family support and community-based programming.
Helped run child activities and beneficiary intake during crisis-response initiatives.
Trained in respectful communication, note taking, and referral-sensitive situations.
Comfortable in both structured and field-based support roles.

volunteers.description: I prefer volunteer roles that involve systems, registration, or helping teams work more efficiently with data and devices. I have supported help desks, intake forms, and basic tech setup for student and community programs. I am strongest when the work needs accuracy and follow-through.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Computer science graduate with volunteer experience in registration desks and digital support tasks.
Assisted student-facing help desks and data entry workflows in Beirut and Tripoli.
Comfortable with spreadsheets, basic troubleshooting, and device setup.
Interested in tech-for-good and process improvement.

volunteers.description: I have volunteered mostly in kitchens, food parcel support, and nutrition-awareness activities. I enjoy practical roles where food preparation and communication both matter. I am especially interested in dignified food access and family-focused nutrition support.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Nutrition graduate with experience in community kitchens and food parcel operations.
Supported meal preparation, awareness booths, and produce rescue activities.
Knowledge of basic food safety and beneficiary-facing communication.
Interested in public nutrition and food security programming.

volunteers.description: Most of my volunteering has been in urgent settings where teams need disciplined, dependable support. I am comfortable in shelter logistics, clinic-facing roles, and fast-moving distribution environments. I respond well to pressure and like roles with clear operational purpose.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Emergency medical technician with volunteer support history in mobile clinics and shelter operations.
Assisted with registration, kit preparation, and supply movement during rapid-response activities.
Certified in first aid and experienced in shift-based coordination.
Works well in structured high-pressure environments.

volunteers.description: I gravitate toward outreach, communication, and front-desk style volunteer work. I have experience speaking with beneficiaries, calling participants, and helping events feel organized and welcoming. I bring strong written communication and a friendly presence.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Communications graduate with nonprofit volunteer experience in outreach and event support.
Handled donor calls, registration desks, and public-facing awareness tasks.
Comfortable drafting short messages, speaking with participants, and collecting feedback.
Interested in community engagement and campaign support.

volunteers.description: I am best suited to route-based logistics, dispatch coordination, and delivery support. I have volunteered in meal routes, distribution logistics, and transport-adjacent roles where timing matters. I like practical work that keeps operations moving.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Experienced driver and logistics volunteer supporting deliveries and dispatch tasks.
Worked on meal routes, queue support, and fleet-adjacent operations.
Comfortable with route planning, loading support, and punctual shift work.
Strong sense of responsibility and field coordination.

volunteers.description: I enjoy volunteer roles that support children directly, especially in learning or safe recreational spaces. I have helped with reading support, homework clubs, and child-friendly group activities. I am patient, warm, and comfortable adapting to different age groups.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Early childhood education student with volunteer experience in tutoring and child activities.
Supported reading sessions, homework help, and child-friendly spaces.
Comfortable working with children, caregivers, and small activity groups.
Interested in inclusive educational support and psychosocial-safe environments.

volunteers.description: My strength is in practical support roles involving equipment, setup, and maintenance-minded tasks. I can help with technical preparation, storage checks, and making sure physical spaces and tools are ready for use. I like concrete problems with visible solutions.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Technical support volunteer with hands-on experience in equipment and lab setup.
Assisted inventory checks, cooler prep, and computer lab readiness.
Background in basic electrical work and maintenance support.
Reliable in logistics-meets-technical environments.

volunteers.description: I like community-facing volunteer work that involves listening, registration, and follow-up. My experience has been in check-in desks, surveys, and home-oriented support activities. I work well in roles that require calm communication and respectful follow-through.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Community development graduate with field experience in beneficiary-facing volunteer roles.
Supported surveys, registration desks, and home-related assistance activities.
Skilled in note taking, coordination, and respectful communication.
Interested in local aid systems and community resilience.

volunteers.description: I am most useful in operations that need accurate records, stock visibility, and disciplined organization. I have volunteered in counting, tagging, and tracking tasks where small mistakes matter. I prefer structured roles that improve accountability and flow.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Accounting and operations background with volunteer experience in inventory and audit-style support.
Worked on stock counts, asset tagging, and registration-heavy tasks.
Strong spreadsheet skills and detail orientation.
Interested in transparent, well-run humanitarian operations.

volunteers.description: I am interested in healthcare support roles where accuracy and patient-facing communication are both important. My volunteer work has included medication packing, clinic registration, and basic public-health event support. I enjoy roles that combine care with organized execution.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Pharmacy graduate with volunteer exposure to medication packing and clinic support.
Helped prepare supplies and guide participants through health service workflows.
Strong attention to detail and comfort around healthcare environments.
Interested in safe, accessible community health delivery.

volunteers.description: I like volunteering and helping where needed. I can do many kinds of tasks and adapt quickly. Looking for useful opportunities with good teams.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Worked in different volunteer events and support activities.
Helped with sorting, registrations, and general tasks.
Can learn quickly and follow instructions.
Available for flexible shifts.

volunteers.description: I like workin with kids and helping them do there school tasks. I did volontir work in small groups and activites and i am comfy talking with parents too. I want oppertunities where I can be usefull and present.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Education student.
Helped in homework groups and child activites.
Can support reading, games, and parent check-in.
Looking for more community volontir hours.

volunteers.description: I am comfortable with administrative work, structured tasks, and anything that involves keeping things moving. I have helped in support roles where records, follow-up, and communication mattered. Open to operations, coordination, and general support work.

My main background is in design and creative communication, but I have also volunteered in public events and community programs. I am especially useful in awareness-facing work, youth spaces, and roles that need both people skills and presentation sense. I may be less suited to highly operational warehouse tasks.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Graphic design graduate with experience in community events and youth-facing activities.
Helped with awareness booths, participant check-in, and light coordination.
Comfortable creating visual materials and speaking with attendees.
Interested in civic engagement and meaningful public campaigns.

volunteers.description: I have mostly volunteered in field-based work related to food systems, cleanup days, and practical logistics. I am comfortable outdoors, with physical tasks, and with activities tied to agriculture or environmental recovery. I prefer direct, hands-on opportunities.
volunteers.cv_summary_text:
Field operations volunteer with experience in produce rescue, cleanup days, and food support logistics.
Worked in outdoor environments across Bekaa and North Lebanon.
Comfortable with lifting, packing, and simple field coordination.
Interested in environment, food systems, and practical community support.

new_postings.description: Call parents to confirm workshop attendance and remind families about ongoing student support services. Simple but repetitive outreach shift.
